Interface DRIPlot

All Superinterfaces:
Serializable
All Known Subinterfaces:
DRIAxisPlot, DRIBarPlot, DRIBasePlot, DRIBubblePlot, DRICandlestickPlot, DRIDifferencePlot, DRIGroupedStackedBarPlot, DRIHighLowPlot, DRILayeredBarPlot, DRILinePlot, DRIMeterPlot, DRIMultiAxisPlot, DRIPiePlot, DRISpiderPlot, DRIThermometerPlot, DRIWaterfallBarPlot, DRIXyBlockPlot, DRIXyStepPlot
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractBasePlot, DRAxisPlot, DRBarPlot, DRBubblePlot, DRCandlestickPlot, DRDifferencePlot, DRGroupedStackedBarPlot, DRHighLowPlot, DRLayeredBarPlot, DRLinePlot, DRMeterPlot, DRMultiAxisPlot, DRPiePlot, DRSpiderPlot, DRThermometerPlot, DRWaterfallBarPlot, DRXyBlockPlot, DRXyStepPlot
public interface DRIPlot extends Serializable

DRIPlot interface.
